title: PQ2
description:
Practice Quiz PQ2 covers Lectures 3 and 4. It is based on assignments A3 and A4 and the examples covered in Lecture 4 supplement. To take the practice quiz, please go to accepi.com.

 

Please note: PQ2 is not graded.
